title: fix can't run by source code
body:
the error is:    fix NoMatches: No nodes match <class 'textual.widgets._rich_log.RichLog'> on XHSDownloader

Explore the source code to identify the files and functions to modify.

step_plan.summary: Guard RichLog widget retrieval in XHSDownloader.on_mount to prevent startup crash when RichLog is not present, enabling the TUI to start and settings validation to run even if RichLog is absent.

steps.reason: During startup, screen.query_one(RichLog) may raise NoMatches if RichLog is not yet added to the screen. By wrapping the call in try/except and passing None when absent, startup becomes resilient and settings validation can proceed.
steps.side_effects: Potentially requires Settings.check_keys to gracefully handle a None log widget; no UI changes to initial layout; ensures app startup does not crash when RichLog is unavailable; may require a follow-up adjustment if downstream code assumes a non-null logger
